news.t: CresAlta Marks Debut with Launch of Two Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: CVGD is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Morgan Stanley Instl Lqudty Govt Instl stock at 6.53%, Citigroup at 5.07%, CVS Health at 4.16%, Verizon Communications at 3.96%, and Elevance Health at 3.92%.

overview.description: The CresAlta Global Dividend ETF (CVGD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed global dividend equity ETF that invests in US and international companies with strong cash flows, attractive valuations, and the potential for sustainable dividend growth. CVGD was launched on May 18, 2026 and is issued by CresAlta.
